title: aspalathus hispida
intro: Aspalathus hispida, commonly known as the bitter leaf or Rooibos' bitter relative, is a plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae. It is rich in flavonoids and xanthines, which contribute to its medicinal properties, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Aspalathus hispida include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia.
